{{Infobox technique
| name = Shadow
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] can double up the [[Endless Sword]] with the [[Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara landed a heavy slash on the [[Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] needed shadow to fight spirits.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
